command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SHOW CREATE TABLE signatures;
stdout:
Table	Create Table
signatures	CREATE TABLE `signatures` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `signerId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `signatureRequestId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `signatureType` enum('drawn','typed','uploaded','initials') NOT NULL,
  `signatureData` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `signatureText` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `signatureImageUrl` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `pageNumber` int(11) DEFAULT '1',
  `positionX` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `positionY` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `width` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `height` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `legalAcknowledgment` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `acknowledgmentText` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `capturedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `capturedIp` varchar(45) NOT NULL,
  `capturedUserAgent` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `capturedTimezone` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `signatureHash` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `verified` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `verifiedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `verifiedBy` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin
